textByHash.141e1fdf643760dc59c1b0887b67f7f321137e17: What are you doing here? You're not one of the guards.
textByHash.19d0c1ea07adeee5f0ef197dbe1e039f796f12f2: Go 'way! This pint'sh nearly finished! Unlessh you got more that ish....? Wizards, s'all the wizard's fault...prob'ly that Zavistic one, he'sh the worsht!
textByHash.1b7d25a23f774f90f6e2b46f29021a3780018819: Lucky for him, means he can get even more work done.
textByHash.3157402e5737387d1386237f34d1db1cd5fd14c9: No good if you don' have space fer it in yer invent'ry, come back when you do.
textByHash.515075d9b7fcdfa9f6410580f43580aa13575703: I don' need a hand drinkin me beer, go 'way!
textByHash.72b3937ec90eddeea9f1f63dc4341dcd2a0d5ab1: E're, you left this 'and in me beer!
textByHash.76cc78aee109e2e19869a492ed896dba28181525: Talk to tha' hand coz thish face ain't lishtnin'!
textByHash.7e3f1004efd3df71a4165e4b212d1a78a00ebb00: Yeeeuuuch! I hatesh that shtuff, jusht bring ush a beer! Mmmmm beer!
textByHash.aca3103aa0fb914b5fe34df00a01c64e372d8fd4: I suppose, but why would you want to explore down here?
textByHash.d36836eabdcb1fa60f8fe76ebf0cea714df4344d: Oops, No 'arm done. S'prob'ly a wizard, i's always the wizards fault, go ask them, jus' ring the bell outshide the guild and talk to the first pointy hatted ninny you shee!
textByHash.dde6e8f2cd61525d8727a71d9c1635535950c0f6: If you say so. Just don't go causing any trouble.
textByHash.f11737e8295796fabfcdc1056ee1aa15c9d08e2e: Ahh... jus' wha' I need, now, wha' did you wanna know?
